message:
style: fix clippy lints (single_char_pattern format args, derived_partial_eq_without_eq)

Two clippy nits surfaced by `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`:

crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs (rebuild_table_from_select)
  Two `format!(... , )` invocations had trailing commas before the
  closing paren — clippy::format_in_format_args / a stylistic strip
  by the latest clippy.  Removed the trailing commas.  No behavioural
  change; the resulting INSERT SQL is byte-identical.

crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/jit.rs (InsertValueSource enum)
  `clippy::derive_partial_eq_without_eq` — `InsertValueSource` derives
  `PartialEq` and contains only `Eq`-compatible variants
  (`Binding(usize)` and a Value-typed variant whose inner type is
  itself `Eq`), so it should derive `Eq` as well.  Added it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
